Vantage FX
Opening Script
Hi, is ________________ there?
Hey 	_________________________! 	__________________, 	calling 	from 	(your
companies name), in (your companies’ location). How you going today?
Okay, great! Now, ____________, I see you downloaded our (your product or service)
from our website yesterday, the Meta-trader 4. I was just calling to see if you’ve had a
chance to install that yet … and maybe do a few trades? Have you gotten it up and
running?
(If he says yes)
Okay, great! Now, is this your first time trading the currency markets or do you have
some experience with it? (Get him talking if he has some experience, and then start fully
qualifying him.)
(If he says no)
Okay, no problem. Is this your first time trading the currency markets or do you have
some experience with it? (Get him talking if he has some experience, and then start fully
qualifying him.)
1) 	And are you currently invested in any other markets right now? Any stocks,
bonds, mutual funds?
2) 	And what kind of work are you doing now?
3) 	Okay! And how’re things going for you?
4) 	And just for suitability purposes, how would you say your current financial
situation? Are you doing well right now, or have things been a bit tight lately?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

5) 	And how much do you typically put into an investment idea when you like it?
6) 	And how much are you currently liquid for? Again, just a ballpark …
Okay, great! Well, based on everything you’ve just said to me, the program we have here
at (your companies name) is definitely a perfect fit for you.
(If he is already trading and is qualified, go into a close)
(If he is not ready to be closed, send him some support info and tell him you’ll touch base
with him in a few days to see how he’s doing.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
